name: Low Fat Breakfast Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a non-stick skillet with non-stick cooking spray and heat over medium heat.
2. Add all vegetables to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally for 2-3 minutes or until tender.
3. Stir in basil and ham; cook an additional 1-2 minutes or until hot.
4. Remove the vegetable mixture from the skillet and set aside.
5. In a small bowl, combine egg product, skim milk, fat free margarine, salt, and pepper.
6. Spray the skillet with non-stick cooking spray again.
7. Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and cook until the bottom is set.
8. Using a spatula, gently lift one edge of the omelet and fold it over to cover half of the filling.
9. Spoon the ham-vegetable mixture and cheese onto the unfilled portion of the omelet.
10. Fold the other half of the omelet over the top to enclose the filling.
11. Cook until the omelet is set but still moist; do not overcook.
12. Serve immediately (serves 2).
Tips:
- If egg beaters are unavailable, use 5 egg whites and 1 egg yolk for each half of the recipe or omelet.
- Use 98% fat-free lunch meat or have a deli slice ham to about 1/8 inch thick for chopped ham.
